title: Gelato Galore 2
description: All the ice cream you need!
body:
![Gelato Galore](https://i.imgur.com/WF84KcD.png)

**Gelato Galore** is a mod that adds Ice Cream! The mod adds a unique way of creating many different flavors of ice cream, and mixing them together to your liking.

## Making Ice Cream
Making ice cream is pretty simple. You just have to follow the following steps:
1. Create the syrup: To start, you need a syrup of a specific ice cream flavor. To make it, combine milk, sugar, and the component of the flavor.
2. Fill a cauldron with Powder Snow.
3. Click with the syrup on the cauldron.

And voila! You have a cauldron filled with ice cream!

Ice cream can be built with up to 3 scoops of any flavor you want. You can also top the ice cream with special toppings which augment the ice cream's effects.

There are further notes about making and expanding ice cream in a special Patchouli book.
![All of the current flavors](https://i.imgur.com/Umc4jkG.png)

## Additional Features
The mod adds a few more features:

- **Caramel:** Caramel is a new food which can be created by smelting sugar. It also makes for a great ice cream flavor!
- **Vanilla:** Vanilla is a new plant which you can get from the Confectioner villager. This plant grows on the side of blocks, just like a vine, and can bloom with vanilla flowers. 
Once vanilla blooms, you can harvest its pods and smelt them to create dried vanilla pods, which you can turn into fantastic vanilla ice cream!

![Caramel and Vanilla](https://i.imgur.com/yE3z5Zf.png)

- **The Confectioner:** The Confectioner is a new villager type, which uses an ice cream cauldron as a workbench. The Confectioner sells a variety of items relating to ice cream and sugary foods in general.

![The Confectioner](https://i.imgur.com/Pyzly1a.png)

- **Scooper:** The scooper is a new tool capable of scooping out ice cream balls!
You can use the scooper in many different ways: Build up ice cream, throw it at enemies, or even make an..

- **Ice Cream Sandwich:** A delicacy made from two cookies and an ice cream ball.
Each ice cream sandwich has 4 bites, each giving you a weaker version of the flavor's effect.

![Scooper and Ice Cream Sandwich](https://i.imgur.com/tfMZONZ.png)

## Q&A:

**Q: Can I use this mod in a Modpack? **

**A: Of course!** If you do, send me a message about it. I would love to try it out!

 

**Q: I Found a bug, where can I report it?**

A: You can either report it **here** or in the **GitHub** page. I will try to answer it ASAP.

 

**Q: I have a new idea! Where can I post it?**

**A: Ideas are always welcome!** If you have a new idea, either send me **a DM**, post it **here**, or in the **GitHub** page.
